creator: rm@FreeBSD.org
text:
From the offsite:

"""
The use of Argus versions 2.x is now discouraged. Please consider running argus-3.0.x as your first choice for argus and its client programs. 
"""

I suggest to deprecate net-mgmt/argus and net-mgmt/argus-clients in one month period, because this software branch is no more supported and superseded by argus3. Would you approve?
